category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides Cargo subcommands to invoke LLVM tools shipped with the Rust toolchain.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cargo-binutils; source_facts.homepage points to the rust-embedded/cargo-binutils project.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official repository; its README is the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source-control repository for rust-embedded/cargo-binutils.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies LLVM toolchain subcommands; source_facts.executables lists cargo-* and rust-* binutils tools.
